intro: Tubella dunstervillei, also known as the "Dunsterville's Tubella", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing relief from various health issues, including inflammation and pain, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Tubella dunstervillei include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects.
